zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe von Geldern於大約1250年出生時，她的父親Otto II. von Geldern36歲，母親Philippe de Dammartin38歲。她於1262年與Enguerrand IV de Coucy結婚。她去世於1281年之後在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可列福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarethe von Geldern于大约1250年出生时，她的父亲Otto II. von Geldern36岁，母亲Philippe de Dammartin38岁。她于1262年与Enguerrand IV de Coucy结婚。她去世于1281年之后在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可列福。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe von Geldern was born about 1250, her father, Otto II. von Geldern, was 36 and her mother, Philippe de Dammartin, was 38. She married Enguerrand IV de Coucy in 1262. She died after 1281, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe von Geldern est née environ 1250, son père, Otto II. von Geldern, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Philippe de Dammartin, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand IV de Coucy en 1262. Elle est décédée après 1281, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe von Geldern um 1250 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto II. von Geldern 36 und ihre Mutter Philippe de Dammartin 38. Sie hat 1262 Enguerrand IV de Coucy geheiratet. Sie starb nach 1281 in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Geldern è nata il circa 1250, sua padre, Otto II. von Geldern, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Philippe de Dammartin, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand IV de Coucy nel 1262. Morì dopo il 1281, nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Geldernが約1250年に生まれた時，父Otto II. von Geldernは36歳，母Philippe de Dammartinは38歳であった。1262年にEnguerrand IV de Coucyと結婚した。彼女は1281年以後にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe von Geldern(이)가 대략 1250년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto II. von Geldern(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippe de Dammartin(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1262년 Enguerrand IV de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1281년 이후 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarethe von Geldern nasceu aproximadamente 1250, seu pai, Otto II. von Geldern, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Philippe de Dammartin, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand IV de Coucy em 1262. Ela faleceu após 1281, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe von Geldern родилась около 1250 г., её отцу по имени Otto II. von Geldern было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippe de Dammartin, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand IV de Coucy в 1262 г. Она умерла после 1281 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия.

sm.um 1250–Aft 1281: e tusa o le 1250–ina ua ma'ea le 1281

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarethe von Geldern nació aproximadamente 1250, su papá, Otto II. von Geldern, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Philippe de Dammartin, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Enguerrand IV de Coucy en 1262. Murió después de 1281, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania.
